resume_instructions: Next tock should re-run PLAN gate on naval-scribe/plan.md (v3). Lessons-angle CSP-hash veto on v2 was reviewed by human and overridden as a false positive: naval-scribe has no CSP at all so there was no hash to recompute. The underlying lesson in learnings.md was tightened to be conditional on the project actually using a hash-based CSP. v3 also addresses the bugs (import migration) and ui (aria-describedby on dist toggle) objections from v2. After PLAN gate passes, build the Distribution/Copy-To feature.
